# seerr_sonarr_server (Resource)

Manage Seerr Sonarr server settings via /api/v1/settings/sonarr.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_sonarr_quality_profile" "shows" {
  url     = var.sonarr_url
  api_key = var.sonarr_api_key
  name    = "HD-1080p"
}

resource "seerr_sonarr_server" "shows" {
  url                     = var.sonarr_url
  api_key                 = var.sonarr_api_key
  quality_profile_id      = data.seerr_sonarr_quality_profile.shows.quality_profile_id
  active_directory        = "/media/tv"
  active_anime_directory  = "/media/tv-anime"
  enable_season_folders   = true
  is_default              = true
}
```

The provider will automatically resolve `activeProfileName` from Sonarr using
`quality_profile_id` when `quality_profile_name` is omitted.

### Example With Explicit Profile Name Override

```terraform
resource "seerr_sonarr_server" "shows" {
  url                  = var.sonarr_url
  api_key              = var.sonarr_api_key
  quality_profile_id   = 4
  quality_profile_name = "HD-1080p"
  active_directory     = "/media/tv"
}
```

Use `quality_profile_name` when your Sonarr API is unreachable from where
OpenTofu runs, or when you want deterministic payload behavior without profile
lookup.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `active_directory` (String)
- `api_key` (String, Sensitive)
- `quality_profile_id` (Number)

### Optional

- `active_anime_directory` (String)
- `anime_tags` (List of Number)
- `base_url` (String)
- `enable_season_folders` (Boolean)
- `extra_payload_json` (String)
- `hostname` (String)
- `is_4k` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `prevent_search` (Boolean)
- `quality_profile_name` (String) Optional override. If omitted, provider resolves the name from Sonarr using `quality_profile_id`.
- `sync_enabled` (Boolean)
- `tag_requests` (Boolean)
- `tags` (List of Number)
- `url` (String)
- `use_ssl` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `response_json` (String)
- `server_id` (Number)
